forceEndTournament(tid).notes: Callable Cloud Function. Requires request.auth.uid === ADMIN_UID. Transitions tournament status to 'unfinished', captures current chip-stack standings as final_standings (by descending chip count), triggers leaderboard recompute.

recomputeLeaderboards().notes: Admin-only callable. Walks every tournament with status 'finished' or 'unfinished', applies scoreTournament per player per tournament, rewrites /leaderboards/{scale} documents.

hideTournamentFromPublicLeaderboards(tid.notes: Admin-only. Sets /tournaments/{tid}.hidden_from_leaderboards=true. The next recompute will skip this tournament.

resetPlayerNickname(uid).notes: Admin-only. Clears /players/{uid}.nickname so the player displays as their Google given_name on next render.

notes: section-8's admin UI calls these Cloud Functions. Authorization is enforced inside each function (request.auth.uid === ADMIN_UID) AND by Firestore rules on the underlying documents.
